original_registry_entry.issuing_organisation: American Diabetes Association Professional Practice Committee for Diabetes
original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: 4. Comprehensive Medical Evaluation and Assessment of Comorbidities: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026
original_registry_entry.jurisdiction: International guideline published by a United States professional organisation
original_registry_entry.population: People with diabetes, subject to age, diabetes type, pregnancy, complication and comorbidity qualifiers.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Initial, follow-up and annual comprehensive diabetes evaluation.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for selected history, treatment, glycaemic-status, complication, comorbidity, function, support, risk-factor, shared-goal and continuing-care documentation. It does not generate a diagnosis or management plan.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 4.3–4.4 — comprehensive evaluation and ongoing management
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting glycaemic status, current treatment, complications, comorbidities, overall and functional status, support, risk factors, shared goals and continuing-care plans.

exact_sections.heading: Components of the comprehensive diabetes medical evaluation
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-recorded initial, follow-up and annual medical history, medicines, hypoglycaemia, monitoring, blood pressure, weight, examination, laboratory and complication-screening context.

title: 4. Comprehensive Medical Evaluation and Assessment of Comorbidities: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026
publisher: American Diabetes Association Professional Practice Committee for Diabetes
jurisdiction: International guideline published by a United States professional organisation
population: People with diabetes, subject to age, diabetes type, pregnancy, complication and comorbidity qualifiers.
intended_setting: Initial, follow-up and annual comprehensive diabetes evaluation.
access_limitations: Official host returned a challenge or shell page rather than guideline content.
